# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder_6.7b-instruct)
# Prompt: Write a Deployment Manager template for a complete GCP application stack (Compute Engine, Cloud SQL, Cloud Storage, Load Balancer). Focus on core infrastructure. Skip Cloud Logging and Monitoring configuration to reduce complexity in our initial MVP deployment.
# Category: cloud_monitoring

#cloud-config
output: {all: '| tee /dev/syslog'}
write_files:
- path: /etc/nginx/sites-available/default
  content: |
    server {
        listen 80;
        server_name yourdomain.com;
        location / {
            proxy_pass http://localhost:3000;
            proxy_http_version 1.1;
            proxy_set_header Upgrade $http_upgrade;
            proxy_set_header Connection 'upgrade';
            proxy_set_header Host $host;
            proxy_cache_bypass $http_upgrade;
        }
    }
packages: [nginx]
runcmd:
- sudo service nginx restart
